title: oscore: MemorySecurityContext missing algorithm validation
description:
File: python/src/lichen/crypto/oscore.py
Lines: 82-83

The constructor accesses algorithm and hashfun dictionaries without validation:

```python
self.alg_aead = algorithms[algorithm]
self.hashfun = hashfunctions[hashfun]
```

If an invalid algorithm ID or hashfun name is passed, this raises a cryptic KeyError instead of a clear ValueError with guidance on valid values.

Example:
```python
MemorySecurityContext(..., algorithm=999)  # Raises: KeyError: 999
```

Fix: Add validation with helpful error message listing valid algorithms/hashfunctions.
close_reason: Implemented validation for algorithm and hashfun in MemorySecurityContext constructor with clear ValueError messages listing valid options. Updated docstring. Tests and linters pass. Local commit 5031146c0
